title: Moderate Copper
description: Have a more moderate amount of raw copper output in the game! Same as iron ores.
body:
# Moderate Copper

 ![1 per ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff0b6274eea85b25357a19e98a085c5d4c33dc8d.png)

### Have a more moderate amount of raw copper output in the game!  


Changes Minecraft's Copper Ore uniform output from [2 to 5] down to just [1], same as iron ores.
